title: Xautoを呼び出して
summary_text: **Findings (Production Alignment Gaps)** 1. **P0: Live repo variables currently force Claude-centric orchestration, overriding your local vote-first/codex+assist-none design.** Observed via `gh api` on `cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator` (2026-04-07): `FUGUE_MAIN_ORCHESTRATOR_PROVIDER=claude`, `FUGUE_ASSIST_ORCHESTRATOR_PROVIDER=claude`, `FUGUE_REQUIRE_CLAUDE_SUB_ON_COMPLEX=true`, `FUGUE_REQUIRE_DIRECT_CLAUDE_ASSIST=true`. This conflicts with local design defaults: [orchestrator-policy.sh#L23-L24](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/orchestrator-policy.sh#L23), [build-agent-matrix.sh#L8-L10](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L8), [CODEX.md#L95-L100](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md#L95). Minimal safe changes: set prod vars to `FUGUE_MAIN_ORCHESTRATOR_PROVIDER=codex`, `FUGUE_ASSIST_ORCHESTRATOR_PROVIDER=none`, and disable Claude-only gates unless intentionally required. 2. **P0: Workflow defaults still hard-fallback assist to `claude`, so unset/mis-set vars drift to old behavior.** Refs: [fugue-task-router.yml#L351](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-task-router.yml#L351), [fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L193](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L193), [fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1450](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1450). This is inconsistent with resolver/local defaults to `none`: [resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L79](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L79). Minimal safe changes: change those workflow fallback literals from `'claude'` to `'none'` to match current design. 3. **P1: Ops path (`gha24`) contains stale Claude fallback logic, creating env-ops drift even if core scripts are updated.** Refs: [gha24#L526-L531](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/gha24#L526), contrasted with its own policy invocation default assist none at [gha24#L279-L281](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/gha24#L279). Minimal safe changes: make `gha24` variable fallback and invalid-value normalization default to `none` (not `claude`). 4. **P1: Test coverage does not currently protect against production-default drift in workflow YAML/vars.** Current tests mostly inject `DEFAULT_ASSIST_ORCHESTRATOR_PROVIDER=none` directly (so they bypass YAML fallback semantics): [test-route-task-handoff.sh#L89](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-route-task-handoff.sh#L89), [test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L88](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L88). Minimal safe changes: add a CI drift check asserting workflow fallback literals and (optionally) a read-only `gh api` vars audit for `main/assist/claude-gates` against design targets.
